default.title: GateFlow — Smart Access Control for Egypt & Gulf
default.description: Modern QR-based access control for gated communities, schools, events, and clubs across Egypt and the Gulf. Real-time monitoring, offline scanning, and full audit logs.

pricing.title: Pricing | GateFlow
pricing.description: Simple, transparent pricing for gate access control. Choose the plan that fits your community, school, or event size.

contact.title: Contact Us | GateFlow
contact.description: Get in touch with the GateFlow team for enterprise deployments, custom integrations, or general security inquiries.
